{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231521282EB7521BAD4F350A2FDD"}"},"total":34},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616284516187718424","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，内容新颖，故事引人入胜，值得看，作"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773309149,"group_id":"7610340561106504766","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3z/8s0uQLvd1GVAE9jjRpLyzm659dDDUbg9lQ8M1MO3","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1775054306946396","user_name":"胆小怕事的山河扇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1775054306946396","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610340561106504766","book_info":{"abstract":"开局觉醒空间异能，这特务我不当了，我直接降维打击！
本想低调卧底，结果金手指实力它不允许啊！
场景一：识破内鬼。
他在人群中扫了一眼，【情绪雷达】爆红。
他直接拔枪爆头。结果：一死无对证的死局，硬生生被他摸尸摸出密码本！
众人傻眼：“神仙断案？这特么也行？！”
场景二：对抗神风死士。
死士身绑炸弹冲入会场，引线已燃。
他淡定一指。结果：炸弹变成了两根大葱，死士当场自闭！
日寇：“大日本天皇在上，我们到底在跟什么怪物作对？！”
场景三：魔都大决战。
敌军企图同归于尽。
他反手掏出空间里的巴祖卡。结果：一人火力压制整个特务营！
所有人：这哪是潜伏，这是开了锁血挂的活阎王啊！
当五星红旗升起，功成身退的沈青渊点燃一支烟。
他看着瑟瑟发抖的残存反派（冷笑）：
“时代变了，大人，该上路了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/de4c29a34019712db2b212d4927d6086","author":"南宁的秦跃山","author_id":"","book_id":"7610340561106504766","book_name":"谍战：从摸尸日谍开始杀穿上海滩","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610340612776149566","read_count":"97572","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"250698"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"122","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,穿越,空间,开局,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of3329c0016c1f523f4a81f54a41ec45f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434488&x-signature=oO0%2Fh5EZ92ZOM3OHCbFbkmjr9B8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"992196941067386","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231521282EB7521BAD4F350A2FDD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
